revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 15 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 15 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月15日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[669年]]_月_日） - 臨終に際して[[中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15年（[[743年]]_月_日） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6年（[[1140年]]_月_日） - 鳥羽上皇の北面の武士・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]3年（[[1850年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（[[1866年]]_月_日） - [[小錦八十吉|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月14日 (旧暦)|10月14日]] 翌日[[10月16日 (旧暦)|10月16日]] - 前月[[9月15日 (旧暦)|9月15日]] 翌月[[11月15日 (旧暦)|11月15日]] *新暦[[10月15日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1852年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503年]]）

== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[669年]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15年（ユリウス暦[[743年]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140年]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[2022年]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1852年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.text:
{{Lunar October}} '''Lunar October15日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[669年]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15年（ユリウス暦[[743年]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140年]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[2022年]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1852年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.text:
'''October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 15'''<!--Lunar October15--> is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。

== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1852年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503年]]）

revision.text:
{{Lunar October}} '''October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 15'''<!--Lunar October15--> is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[669年]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15年（ユリウス暦[[743年]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140年]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[2022年]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される
== Births == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1852年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:赤口]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

{{Lunar October}} '''October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 15'''<!--Lunar October15 is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[669年]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15年（ユリウス暦[[743年]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140年]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[2022年]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される
== Births == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1852年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

--> == Events == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[669年]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15年（ユリウス暦[[743年]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140年]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[2022年]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される
== Births == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1852年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[Julian Calendar]][[669]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15年（ユリウス暦[[743]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[2022]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される
== Births == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1852]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1573]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

[[sn:October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]]8th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[669]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15th year（ユリウス暦[[743]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6th year（ユリウス暦[[1140]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[2022]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される
== Births == * [[嘉永]]5th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1852]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933]]） * [[慶応]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1866]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914]]） * [[明治]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1872]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1573]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]]8th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[669]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15th year（ユリウス暦[[743]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6th year（ユリウス暦[[1140]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4th year（グレゴリオ暦[[2022]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/104058722#大相撲力士の四股名の曖昧さ回避に関するリンク修正依頼|Bot作業依頼]]: [[プロジェクト‐ノート:相撲#力士の四股名の曖昧さ回避について|大相撲力士の四股名の曖昧さ回避に関するリンク修正依頼]] (小錦八十吉 (横綱)) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月15日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[669年]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15年（ユリウス暦[[743年]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140年]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[2022年]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1852年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (横綱)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.

== Births == * [[嘉永]]5th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1852]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933]]） * [[慶応]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1866]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]5th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1872]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1573]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503]]）

[[sn:October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[11月13日]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[11月5日]] ） - [[聖武天皇]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[11月26日]] ） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面武士]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[11月8日]] ） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[11月26日]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[11月21日]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[横綱]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[11月15日]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[11月9日]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[島津氏]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

[[sn:October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[聖武天皇]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面武士]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[横綱]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[島津氏]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[聖武天皇]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面武士]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[横綱]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[島津氏]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

[[sn:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[聖武天皇]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面武士]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[横綱]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[島津氏]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[横綱]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[島津氏]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[横綱]]" to "[[Yokozuna]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[聖武天皇]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面武士]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[小説家]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[島津氏]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面武士]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[島津氏]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[島津氏]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵== See Also ==" to "== See Also =="
revision.text:
[[sn:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Emperor Toba|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面Samurai]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "2年" to "2nd year "
revision.text:
[[sn:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Emperor Toba|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面Samurai]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022nd year 11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Emperor Toba|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面Samurai]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022nd year 11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

[[sn:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Emperor Toba|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面Samurai]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022nd year 11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月15日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 15일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] [[zh:十月十五]] [[en:draft:October 15 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Emperor Toba|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面Samurai]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022nd year 11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Emperor Toba|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面Samurai]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022nd year 11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]] ） - [[山本権兵衛]] 、16・22代[[Prime Minister of Japan]] ・海軍大将（+ [[1933]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]] ） - [[小錦八十吉 (初代)|初代小錦八十吉]] 、17代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1914]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]] ） - [[岡本綺堂]] 、[[Novelist]] （+ [[1939]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]] ） - [[島津勝久]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 14代目当主（* [[1503]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]] ） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]] が[[天智天皇]] から[[藤原氏|藤原]] の姓を賜る * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が[[東大寺]] 大仏建立の詔を発する * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延|12=draft}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]] ） - [[Emperor Toba|鳥羽上皇]] の[[北面Samurai]] ・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]] と名乗る * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]] ） - [[2022nd year 11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]] が同時に観測される

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|Shakkō|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[天智天皇]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]]） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]]） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延|12=draft}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]]） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]]） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[1933]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[1914]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. [[1939]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[1503]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月十五]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|Shakkō|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[Emperor Tenji]] 8th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[669]] [[November 13]]） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[November 5]]） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * {{ill|Hoen|ja|保延|12=draft}} 6th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1140]] [[November 26]]） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * {{ill|Reiwa|ja|令和|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[2022]] [[November 8]]） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1852]] [[November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[1933]]). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1866]] [[November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[1914]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. [[1939]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[1503]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月15日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の15日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天智天皇]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[669年]][[11月13日]]） - 臨終に際して[[藤原鎌足|中臣鎌足]]が[[天智天皇]]から[[藤原氏|藤原]]の姓を賜る * [[天平]]15年（ユリウス暦[[743年]][[11月5日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が[[東大寺]]大仏建立の詔を発する * [[保延]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1140年]][[11月26日]]） - [[鳥羽天皇|鳥羽上皇]]の[[北面武士]]・佐藤義清が出家し[[西行]]と名乗る * [[令和]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[2022年]][[11月8日]]） - [[2022年11月8日の月食|皆既月食と天王星食]]が同時に観測される
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1852年]][[11月26日]]） - [[山本権兵衛]]、16・22代[[内閣総理大臣]]・海軍大将（+ [[1933年]]） * [[慶応]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月21日]]） - [[小錦八十吉 (横綱)|初代小錦八十吉]]、17代[[横綱]]（+ [[1914年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[11月15日]]） - [[岡本綺堂]]、[[小説家]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[11月9日]]） - [[島津勝久]]、[[島津氏]]14代目当主（* [[1503年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|14|10|16|9|15|11|10|1015}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840184]] Wikidata name: 15th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 15|qq=October 15}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|Shakkō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]]） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]]） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * [[:en:Reiwa era|Reiwa]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:2022|2022]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]]） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[:en:1933|1933]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. [[:en:1939|1939]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[:en:1503|1503]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|Shakkō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]]） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]]） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * [[:en:Reiwa era|Reiwa]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:2022|2022]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]]） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[:en:1933|1933]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. [[:en:1939|1939]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[:en:1503|1503]]).
== Commemorations ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|Shakkō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]]） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]]） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * [[:en:Reiwa era|Reiwa]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:2022|2022]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]]） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[:en:1933|1933]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. [[:en:1939|1939]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[:en:1503|1503]]).
== Commemorations ==

== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[:en:1933|1933]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[:en:1503|1503]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]]） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]]） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * [[:en:Reiwa era|Reiwa]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:2022|2022]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]]） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[:en:1933|1933]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. [[:en:1939|1939]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[:en:1503|1503]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|Shakkō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]]） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]]） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * [[:en:Reiwa era|Reiwa]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:2022|2022]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]]） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[:en:1933|1933]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. [[:en:1939|1939]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[:en:1503|1503]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|Shakkō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]]） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]]） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * [[:en:Reiwa era|Reiwa]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:2022|2022]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]]） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[:en:1933|1933]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. [[:en:1939|1939]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[:en:1503|1503]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|Shakkō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Tenji|Emperor Tenji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:669|669]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]]） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]]） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * [[:en:Hōen|Hoen]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1140|1140]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * [[:en:Reiwa era|Reiwa]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:2022|2022]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]]） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]]） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. [[:en:1933|1933]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]]） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:November 15|November 15]]） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. [[:en:1939|1939]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]]） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born [[:en:1503|1503]]).

== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. {{ill|1933|en|1933|WD=Q18726|lt=1933}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}}） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. {{ill|1914|en|1914|WD=Q2083|lt=1914}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|November 15|en|November 15|WD=Q2982|lt=November 15}}） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|WD=Q18639|lt=1939}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}}） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born {{ill|1503|en|1503|WD=Q6141|lt=1503}}).
== Commemorations ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|October (Old Calendar)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|Old Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|Rokuyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|Shakkō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. {{ill|1933|en|1933|WD=Q18726|lt=1933}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}}） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. {{ill|1914|en|1914|WD=Q2083|lt=1914}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|November 15|en|November 15|WD=Q2982|lt=November 15}}） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|WD=Q18639|lt=1939}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}}） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born {{ill|1503|en|1503|WD=Q6141|lt=1503}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|WD=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|669|en|669|WD=Q31115|lt=669}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13}}） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|WD=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō}} 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|743|en|743|WD=Q23604|lt=743}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5}}） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * {{ill|Hōen|en|Hōen|WD=Q1193929|lt=Hoen}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1140|en|1140|WD=Q19611|lt=1140}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * {{ill|Reiwa era|en|Reiwa era|WD=Q62609017|lt=Reiwa}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|2022|en|2022|WD=Q49625|lt=2022}} {{ill|November 8|en|November 8|WD=Q2990|lt=November 8}}） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}}） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. {{ill|1933|en|1933|WD=Q18726|lt=1933}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}}） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. {{ill|1914|en|1914|WD=Q2083|lt=1914}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|November 15|en|November 15|WD=Q2982|lt=November 15}}） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|WD=Q18639|lt=1939}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}}） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born {{ill|1503|en|1503|WD=Q6141|lt=1503}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|WD=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenji|1=Emperor Tenji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|669|en|669|WD=Q31115|lt=669|1=669}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13|1=November 13}}） – On his deathbed, [[藤原鎌足|Nakatomi Kamatari]] was bestowed the surname [[藤原氏|Fujiwara]] by Emperor Tenji. * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|WD=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|743|en|743|WD=Q23604|lt=743|1=743}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5|1=November 5}}） – Emperor Shōmu issued an edict for the construction of the Great Buddha at Tōdai-ji. * {{ill|Hōen|en|Hōen|WD=Q1193929|lt=Hoen|1=Hōen}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1140|en|1140|WD=Q19611|lt=1140|1=1140}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26|1=November 26}}） – Sato Yoshikiyo, a northern retainer of former Emperor Toba, took the tonsure and began calling himself Saigyō. * {{ill|Reiwa era|en|Reiwa era|WD=Q62609017|lt=Reiwa|1=Reiwa era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|2022|en|2022|WD=Q49625|lt=2022|1=2022}} {{ill|November 8|en|November 8|WD=Q2990|lt=November 8|1=November 8}}） – A total lunar eclipse and an eclipse of Uranus were observed simultaneously.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26|1=November 26}}） – Yamamoto Gonnohyōe, the 16th and 22nd Prime Minister of Japan and an Admiral (d. {{ill|1933|en|1933|WD=Q18726|lt=1933|1=1933}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|WD=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21|1=November 21}}） – The first Konishiki Hachijukichi, the 17th Yokozuna (d. {{ill|1914|en|1914|WD=Q2083|lt=1914|1=1914}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|November 15|en|November 15|WD=Q2982|lt=November 15|1=November 15}}） – Okamoto Kido, a novelist (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|WD=Q18639|lt=1939|1=1939}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9|1=November 9}}） – Shimazu Katsuhisa, the 14th head of the Shimazu Clan (born {{ill|1503|en|1503|WD=Q6141|lt=1503|1=1503}}).
== Commemorations ==
